description: Scope-guard for the v0.16.3 D-CA-001 fix. A canonical test-file `src/foo.test.ts` carries a hardcoded JWT in test-fixture code. The canonical isTestFile() helper must still match the `.test.ts` extension and skip the file — preserving the intent of the original 19-scanner skip-logic for real test-files. If this fixture flips to FAIL post-fix, the new helper lost its extension-check and the fix over-narrowed.
